title: Senior Financial Analyst - EY India - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - EY India - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
EY India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Rajkot. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About EY India:
EY India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EY India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
